title: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Provides income support of Rs.6000 per year to small and marginal farmer families across India in three equal installments.
benefits: Rs.6000 per year in 3 installments of Rs.2000

title: PM Awas Yojana Urban
description: Affordable housing for urban poor through credit-linked subsidy on home loans.
benefits: Interest subsidy up to Rs.2.67 lakh on home loans

title: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Scheme to address declining child sex ratio and promote welfare and education of the girl child.
benefits: Financial incentives, scholarship support, awareness programs

title: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: World's largest health insurance scheme providing Rs.5 lakh per family per year for hospitalization.
benefits: Rs.5 lakh per family per year for hospitalization

title: PM Mudra Yojana
description: Provides loans up to Rs.10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small and micro enterprises.
benefits: Collateral-free loans: Shishu up to Rs.50k, Kishor up to Rs.5L, Tarun up to Rs.10L

title: National Scholarship Portal
description: Single-window portal for students to apply for various central and state government scholarships.
benefits: Scholarships ranging from Rs.1000 to Rs.20000 per year

title: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small savings scheme for girl child providing high interest rate and tax benefits.
benefits: 8.2% interest rate per year, tax exemption under Section 80C

title: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Guaranteed pension scheme for workers in the unorganized sector.
benefits: Guaranteed pension of Rs.1000 to Rs.5000 per month after age 60

title: PM Rozgar Protsahan Yojana
description: Government pays full employer EPF contribution for new employees to incentivize job creation.
benefits: Employer's full EPF contribution 12% paid by government for 3 years

title: Stand Up India
description: Facilitates bank loans between Rs.10 lakh to Rs.1 crore to SC/ST and women entrepreneurs.
benefits: Bank loan from Rs.10 lakh to Rs.1 crore for greenfield enterprises

title: PM Ujjwala Yojana
description: Provides free LPG connections to women from below poverty line households to replace unclean cooking fuels.
benefits: Free LPG connection with first refill and stove

title: Swachh Bharat Mission
description: Provides financial assistance to rural households for construction of individual household toilets.
benefits: Rs.12000 incentive for toilet construction

title: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers suffering crop loss due to natural calamities.
benefits: Insurance coverage for crop loss due to natural calamities

title: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Life insurance scheme offering coverage of Rs.2 lakh at a very low premium of Rs.436 per year.
benefits: Rs.2 lakh life cover at Rs.436/year premium

title: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accident insurance scheme providing coverage for accidental death and disability at just Rs.20 per year.
benefits: Rs.2 lakh accidental death cover at Rs.20/year

title: National Rural Employment Guarantee Act
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to rural households whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work.
benefits: 100 days guaranteed wage employment per year

title: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana
description: Skill development scheme enabling youth to take industry-relevant skill training and get certified.
benefits: Free skill training and certification with monetary reward

title: Digital India Programme
description: Flagship programme to transform India into a digitally empowered society and knowledge economy.
benefits: Digital infrastructure, digital literacy and digital services

title: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Provides soil health cards to farmers with crop-wise recommendations of nutrients and fertilizers.
benefits: Free soil testing and crop-wise fertilizer recommendations

title: Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana
description: Provides all-weather road connectivity to unconnected rural habitations across India.
benefits: All-weather road connectivity to rural areas

title: Sarva Shiksha Abhiyan
description: Universal elementary education programme to provide quality education to children aged 6-14 years.
benefits: Free and compulsory elementary education

title: Mid Day Meal Scheme
description: Provides free lunch to school children to improve nutritional status and boost school attendance.
benefits: Free nutritious mid-day meal in government schools

title: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
description: Maternity benefit programme providing cash incentives to pregnant and lactating women for first live birth.
benefits: Rs.5000 cash incentive for first live birth in 3 installments

title: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension
description: Provides monthly pension to destitute elderly persons aged 60 years and above from below poverty line.
benefits: Rs.200-500 per month pension for BPL elderly

title: Rashtriya Vayoshri Yojana
description: Provides assisted living devices like walking sticks, wheelchairs and hearing aids to senior citizens.
benefits: Free assisted living devices like wheelchairs and hearing aids

title: PM SVANidhi Scheme
description: Micro credit scheme providing affordable loans to street vendors to resume their livelihoods after COVID-19.
benefits: Collateral free working capital loan of Rs.10000 to Rs.50000

title: Startup India
description: Government initiative to build a strong ecosystem for nurturing innovation and startups in India.
benefits: Tax exemption, funding support and simplified regulations for startups

title: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
description: Financial inclusion programme ensuring access to financial services like banking, savings, credit and insurance.
benefits: Zero balance bank account with Rs.2 lakh accident insurance and overdraft facility

title: Disability Pension Scheme
description: Monthly financial assistance to persons with disabilities from below poverty line households.
benefits: Rs.300-500 per month pension for disabled BPL persons

title: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
description: Skill and placement programme for rural youth to provide sustainable employment opportunities.
benefits: Free skill training with guaranteed placement assistance

title: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
description: Support scheme for traditional artisans and craftspeople to upgrade their skills and access credit.
benefits: Credit up to Rs.3 lakh, skill training and toolkit support
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises

title: Agniveer Scheme
description: Short term military service scheme for youth to serve in Indian Armed Forces for 4 years.
benefits: Monthly salary Rs.30000-40000 and Rs.11.71 lakh Seva Nidhi after 4 years

title: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana
description: Free food grain scheme providing 5kg rice or wheat per person per month to poor families.
benefits: 5kg free food grain per person per month
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution

title: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme
description: Promotes apprenticeship training by sharing stipend cost between government and industry.
benefits: 25% stipend reimbursement to employers, skill certification

title: PM Kisan Maan Dhan Yojana
description: Pension scheme for small and marginal farmers providing monthly pension after age 60.
benefits: Rs.3000 per month pension after age 60

title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana Gramin
description: Rural housing scheme providing financial assistance to homeless and kutcha house dwellers in villages.
benefits: Rs.1.2 lakh to Rs.1.3 lakh for house construction in rural areas

title: Jal Jeevan Mission
description: Provides safe and adequate drinking water through individual household tap connections to rural households.
benefits: Free household tap water connection in rural areas

title: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maan Dhan
description: Pension scheme for unorganized sector workers providing monthly pension of Rs.3000 after age 60.
benefits: Rs.3000 per month pension after age 60

title: e-SHRAM Portal
description: National database of unorganized workers providing registration and social security benefits.
benefits: Rs.2 lakh accident insurance and access to social security schemes

title: One Nation One Ration Card
description: Allows beneficiaries to access their ration from any fair price shop across India.
benefits: Access subsidized food grain from any ration shop across India
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution

title: Pradhan Mantri Laghu Vyapari Maan Dhan
description: Pension scheme for small traders and shopkeepers providing Rs.3000 monthly pension after age 60.
benefits: Rs.3000 per month pension after age 60

title: Antyodaya Anna Yojana
description: Provides heavily subsidized food grains to poorest of the poor families at Rs.2-3 per kg.
benefits: 35kg food grain per month at Rs.2 per kg wheat and Rs.3 per kg rice
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution

title: National Health Mission
description: Provides accessible, affordable and quality healthcare to rural and urban populations across India.
benefits: Free healthcare services, medicines and diagnostics at government hospitals

title: Poshan Abhiyaan
description: National nutrition mission to reduce malnutrition among children, pregnant women and lactating mothers.
benefits: Nutritional supplements, counselling and health checkups

title: Deen Dayal Antyodaya Yojana
description: Skill training and livelihood enhancement scheme for urban and rural poor.
benefits: Free skill training and placement support for urban and rural poor

title: AICTE Pragati Scholarship
description: Scholarship for girl students pursuing technical education in AICTE approved institutions.
benefits: Rs.50000 per year scholarship for tuition and incidental charges

title: PM YASASVI Scholarship
description: Scholarship scheme for OBC, EBC and DNT students studying in class 9 to 12.
benefits: Rs.75000 to Rs.125000 per year scholarship

title: Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan
description: Provides free antenatal care to pregnant women on the 9th of every month at government health centres.
benefits: Free antenatal checkup on 9th of every month

title: Rashtriya Arogya Nidhi
description: Financial assistance to BPL patients suffering from life threatening diseases for treatment at super speciality hospitals.
benefits: Financial assistance up to Rs.15 lakh for critical illness treatment

title: National Rural Livelihood Mission
description: Empowers rural poor women through self help groups and provides access to financial services and livelihoods.
benefits: Access to credit, skill training and livelihood support through SHGs
